use_cases: Displaying team members with avatars, roles, and online status in a searchable stacked list
Filtering team members by role type (PM, designer, data specialist, creator)
Building team directories or member management interfaces for collaboration platforms
Creating workspace or group chat participant lists with real-time presence indicators
ai_summary: An interactive stacked list component for displaying team members with avatars, role badges, and online/offline status indicators. Features role-based filtering, search functionality, and smooth motion animations for item transitions. Designed for team collaboration interfaces, member directories, and workspace management screens in SaaS and productivity applications.
